visual_description: A man with messy hair and a beard, wearing a red jacket over a plaid shirt, stands in a doorway. He has a wide, unsettling smile and his eyes are wide and fixed on something off-screen. He slowly raises his right hand, pointing his index finger forward in a menacing gesture.
audio_description: A low, ominous, and sustained musical tone plays in the background, creating a suspenseful atmosphere.
